scripts.dev:server: cd server && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8010
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:upgrade: cd server && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.lint: cd server && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: cd server && uv run ruff format .
